## Timeline

### Professional experience for Yury Zaytsev

**Current** 1 year and 4 months, since Apr 2024

#### Research Consultant

Impact Evaluation (self employed)

• M&E of G7/G20 sustainability compliance (G7/ G20 Research Group, University of Toronto);
• Innovation Quotient (SASTRE Consulting Ltd, London, UK);
• Evaluation of market distortions in BRICS countries (LSE Enterprise Ltd, London, UK)
• Tutor at HTW Berlin on economics and finance (BWL Program).
• EVALSDGs Consultant (Methodological working group).

**Current** 2 years and 4 months, since Apr 2023

![](https://www.xing.com/assets/companies/img/default-logo_256x256.png)

#### Visiting Tutor

HTW - Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin

![](https://www.xing.com/assets/companies/img/default-logo_256x256.png)

1 year, Apr 2023 - Mar 2024

#### Professional

[Deloitte](https://www.xing.com/pages/deloitte)

1 year, Apr 2022 - Mar 2023

#### Business analyst (BKYC Team)

Solarisbank AG (Berlin, Germany)

Main Responsibilities: Engagement and analysis of Bank’s clients and associated business risks (Programs used: SAP, JIRA, STATA, E-views)

9 years and 1 month, Mar 2011 - Mar 2020

![](https://www.xing.com/assets/companies/img/default-logo_256x256.png)

#### Consultant

The World Bank Group

![](https://www.xing.com/assets/companies/img/default-logo_256x256.png)

Key responsibilities and achievements:
• preparation of analytical and teaching materials (tool-kit) on topics related to aid management and macroeconomic implications of aid programs,
• development finance impact assessment;
• analysis of the investment climate factors/ effectiveness of foreign direct investments/ CSR projects;
• M&E system development for IDA programs and projects

8 months, Sep 2013 - Apr 2014

#### Visiting Research Fellow

Institute of Development Studies at Sussex University (Brighton, UK)

Key responsibilities:
• research activities within the project “Rising Powers in International Development” (BRICS business) component;
• elaboration of the study module on BRICS business in developing economies.
Main customers: UK DFID.

Log in now to view their full profile.

### Educational background for Yury Zaytsev

7 months, Jan 2023 - Jul 2023

#### Data Analyst

Pantheon Sorbonne, Universite Paris 1 (Paris, France)

Python, Machine Learning, Tableau, SQL, PySpark, DataViz

2 years and 1 month, Mar 2020 - Mar 2022

#### MA in International and Development Economics

Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin

Main courses taken:
• macroeconomics,
• microeconomics,
• econometrics.
